hero.title: A1 Motor Park
hero.subtitle: 3.91 km · 15 turns · 25 pit boxes · 585 m altitude
hero.intro: Bulgaria's first FIA-homologated circuit, opened 21 March 2026 in Samokov.

featured.title: Events
featured.subtitle: Experience racing, rallies, supercars and so much more at Bulgaria's first FIA Grade 3 circuit.

categories.moto: Motorcycle racing, track days and riding schools.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: 14 points of interest, from the main gate to the paddock.

about.title: About A1 Motor Park
about.body: A1 Motor Park is the first fully FIA-homologated circuit on the Balkan Peninsula. Set at the foot of the Rila mountains near Samokov, 3.91 km long with 15 turns, it is the new home of Bulgarian motorsport.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Reach us for information, partnerships, or track rentals.

partners.title: Partners & sponsors
partners.intro: The A1 Motor Park family — the teams, clubs and brands racing with us through 2026 and beyond. Click any logo to visit.
